meaning: n.[俄史]米尔(沙俄时代的一种村社组织)
examples: The space shuttle Atlantis is scheduled to dock with Russia's Mir space station.
It wasn't until the late 1980s when The Soviet Union sent the Mir space station that people began to live in space for a longer time.
Mir war auf dieser Welt das Glück nicht hold!
Continue ferrying supplies to Mir but stop having U.S. astronauts live on the station.
American astronaut visitations to the Russian MIR space station extended this spirit of cooperation and diplomacy.
